mapper.sql: id, phone, email, name, role_code, password, salt, status, birth_year, personal_feature, occupation, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_core_info WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_core_info WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_core_info ( phone, email, name, role_code, password, salt, status, birth_year, personal_feature, occupation, create_by, update_by ) VALUES ( #{phone}, #{email}, #{name}, COALESCE(#{roleCode}, 'USER'), #{password}, #{salt}, #{status}, #{birthYear}, COALESCE(#{personalFeature}, '幽默'), COALESCE(#{occupation}, '软件开发'), COALESCE(#{createBy}, 1), COALESCE(#{updateBy}, 1) )
